gauge.name: Paint Creek at Paint Creek lake Pool

impacts.statement: This is the record crest set on January 14, 2005.
Taylor Road low point in Road A flooded.
Rattlesnake Creek launch ramp closed, with Deer Park Marina and Outgranted wildlife access roads flooded.
Taylor Road and Deer Park launch ramps closed.

dataAttribution.title: Observations courtesy of U.S. Army Corps of Engineers

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
